name: lecture-site-engine
description: Create validated visual lecture sites from raw lecture source.

interface.shortDescription: Turn lecture source into validated visual lessons.
interface.longDescription: Author standalone lectures or confirmed course collections with the Lecture Site Engine schema, then validate, review, and preview the result.
defaultPrompt: Convert my raw lecture source into a validated lecture.
Review this lecture for schema and source-fidelity issues.
Start a local preview of my lecture site.
